narration: Food chains simplify relationships into a linear path. But nature is much messier.

narration: Picture this: a spider spins a web. Every strand connects to multiple insects, not just one.

narration: In a food web, one animal can play multiple roles. A rabbit isn’t just food; it can also be a pollinator.
